Java Automation Engineer - Practical Exercise
Overview
Your task is to write two Cucumber-style automation tests in Java for the website
https://www.b2c2.com/.
You are free to use any resources available to you (including AI) to complete this task.
The candidate should publish the solution to a git repository, then notify the recruiter the solution
is ready to be reviewed.

Requirements
1. Automation Tests:
○ Write two Cucumber-style automation tests using Java.
○ The tests should verify two key functionalities of the candidates choosing to run
against the https://www.b2c2.com/ website.
○ Ensure your tests are robust, well-structured, and follow best practices.
2. Documentation
○ Please provide instructions on how to build and run the test pack

Next Steps
If your solution meets the criteria, we will review it and discuss your implementation during the
next interview stage.
Be prepared to explain your approach, the tools and libraries you used, and any challenges you
faced during the development process.
Good luck, and we look forward to seeing your solution!
